description: Kickoff Good Neighbor Week with music, free lunch, neighbor-speed-dating, and signups for local volunteer projects.
Join Calle 24 and local muralists to paint flower pots, plant sidewalk gardens, and touch up community murals.
Clean up the trails around Bernal Hill, followed by a sunset community picnic with hot cider and local pastries.
A guided walk through Chinatown's historic alleys highlighting local restoration projects, ending in a community tea tasting.
Help sweep Ocean Beach clean. Bags and gloves provided. Free local coffee and pastries for all volunteers!
Bring a book, take a book! Listen to live neighborhood storytelling from legendary local SF residents.
Concluding ceremony celebrating the 2026 SF Good Neighbor Week Award Winners. Catering provided by local SF standard bakeries.
